creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Installing the "curses" gem fixes the problem:

# gem install curses

I don't know which version of diakonos I had installed previously, but perhaps it had used the "ncurses" module/gem before and now uses "curses" instead. I didn't find anything in the upstream changelog though: https://github.com/Pistos/diakonos/blob/master/CHANGELOG

Not sure exactly what changes on my system caused the error, but if others experience the issue then I believe the "curses" gem should either be added to the Ports collection or the diakonos Port should launch a script or command to install the gem.
